_source: Photos sourced from img1.wsimg.com (The Civil's GoDaddy CDN). The IMG_5XXX-Final series is a professional photoshoot recovered via Wayback Machine archived snapshots. See ASSETS.md.

items.alt: Pepperoni pizza in the foreground, mushroom pizza behind it, and a margarita cocktail on a wooden table.
The Civil's dining room with damask wallpaper, leather banquette, brass lamps, and a chalkboard reading 'On Tap — Bellwoods Civil Lager'.
Black-and-white photo of an illuminated marquee BAR sign mounted to a heritage-tannery beam.
A server holds out a mushroom pizza on a wooden board. The Civil's logo is tattooed on their forearm. A margarita cocktail and a flight sit on the table.
A server holds out a prosciutto and arugula pizza in front of a sunny window.
Top-down view of The Bouge — prosciutto, ricotta, arugula, and pear on a wood-fired crust.
Pepperoni pizza in foreground with a hand reaching for a slice; another pizza and cocktail glass in the background.
Side-angle close-up of a mushroom pizza on a wood table.
BBQ pizza with eggs and red onion drizzled in sauce, top-down on a rustic wood plank.
Donair It In Public pizza top-down — donair meat, tomato, onions on a wood-fired crust.
Chicken, tomato, and red onion pizza top-down on rustic wood.
Four pies arranged top-down: prosciutto-arugula, mushroom, donair, and a fourth.
Pepperoni pizza close-up drizzled with hot honey.
Dill Communication pizza top-down — dill pickles, sesame, and sauce drizzle.
Three pizzas arranged on a wood table beside a menu clipboard and a flight of cocktails.
Two pizzas, a cocktail flight, and a printed dinner menu on a wood table.
Two pizzas in vertical composition with a margarita cocktail and a flight on the side.
A whiskey sour in the foreground with a margarita flight on a wooden flight board behind it.
Gin cocktail with a dried pineapple wheel and rosemary sprig, lit by a vintage cut-glass lamp.
A negroni with a large ice block, blood orange peel rose, and segment, on a dark surface.
A red cocktail with a basil leaf garnish on a dark table beside a white wall.
A foamy cocktail with a cucumber wheel and lemon, in the foreground of a pepperoni pizza scene.
Gin & tonic flight in pastel-coloured mason jars on a wooden flight board.
Cocktail flight with strawberry and citrus garnishes against the damask wallpaper.
Cocktail flight in pastel pink, orange, and yellow tones against the damask wallpaper.
Bright cocktail flight with dragon fruit and lime garnishes, white-brick background.
Bourbon hot chocolate flight — four mugs topped with whipped cream against a tufted booth.
